title: ICSI CSEET June 2026 Examinations: Admit Cards Released!
content:
# ICSI CSEET June 2026 Examinations: Admit Cards Released!

Ek important update hai Company Secretary aspirants ke liye! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne Company Secretary Executive Entrance Test (CSEET) June 2026 Examinations ke liye admit cards release kar diye hain aaj, May 21, 2026 ko.

Candidates jo June 2026 session ke liye registered hain, ab apna admit card ICSI ki official website se download kar sakte hain.

*   **Examination Dates:** CSEET June 2026 examinations June 1 se June 4, 2026 tak, offline mode mein conduct kiye jaayenge.
*   **How to Download:** Admit Card download karne ke liye, candidates ko ICSI website par apna Unique ID (application number) aur Date of Birth enter karna hoga.
*   **Important:** Examination center par printed copy of admit card aur ek valid photo ID proof carry karna mandatory hai. Admit card mein details jaise candidate ka naam, photograph, registration number, exam date, timing aur centre address check karna na bhulein. Kisi bhi discrepancy ke case mein, students ko immediately grievance support portal ke through institute ko contact karna chahiye.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/whats-new/)

*Published on: 21 May 2026*
